title: SE2 Fluid or Gas Record
description: Record shape for data/gases.json and data/fluids.json. These resources are referenced widely by blocks (O2/H2 Generator inputs, hydrogen thrusters' fuel, gas tanks' contents, life-support restoration) but the wiki does not publish mass/volume/stack properties for them — most infobox-style fields are null and flagged in dataGaps. `producedBy` / `consumedBy` / `storedIn` close the cross-reference graph by listing the block ids that produce, consume, or store the resource. `locations` is typically null for gases but populated for natural fluids like water.

id.description: snake_case stable key used by other datasets to reference this entry.

producedBy.description: Block ids that produce this gas/fluid (e.g. O2/H2 Generator for hydrogen and oxygen).

consumedBy.description: Block or item ids that consume this gas/fluid (hydrogen thrusters, O2/H2 Generator inputs, etc.).

storedIn.description: Tank block ids that store this gas/fluid. Empty array when no storage block is available.

locations.description: Natural occurrences — populated for environmental fluids (water bodies on planets). null for gases, which are produced in-game rather than mined.

wiki.description: Wiki URL. null when no dedicated page exists (e.g. hydrogen has no standalone wiki page — it is documented only through its consumer/producer pages).
